{{Infobox concept
| name = Champion
| introduced = Of Sea and Shadow
}}

''See also: [[Champion Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Champions]] are legendary, superhuman warriors associated with the [[Champion’s Guild]], which is one of the oldest [[Imperial Guilds]]. Historically, they have played a massive role in the unification of the [[Empire]] and are considered an [[Emperor (Elder Empire)|Emperor]]'s most significant asset. While they possess [[Soulbound powers]], true [[Champions]] are distinguished by a secret alchemical process that enhances their physical and mental capabilities, making them heavier than they appear, resistant to poisons, and nearly impossible to defeat in combat. They are trained from childhood through intense combat and abusive regimens designed to instill a belief that victory is their only virtue. This training also includes mental conditioning to ensure they remain focused and feel invincible. In the modern era, [[Champions]] often earn their living through exhibition matches or duels to demonstrate an employer's power. Despite their immense strength—capable of destroying walls or tearing apart massive creatures with ease—they are noted for their dedication to neutrality. While the [[Champion’s Guild]] has faced dissolution, individual [[Champions]] remain formidable forces on the battlefield. The guild's symbol is the [[Golden Crown]].}}

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|A true member of the Champion's [[Guild]] represents something far greater than a mere [[Soulbound]]. Although they can meditate to hone their various skills, even such a warrior can be unnerved by a gaze consisting of solid blue-white eyes. Despite these moments of vulnerability, a Champion is expected to never fail, regardless of whether they are in disgrace. In certain conflicts, they may also possess the strength required to keep men away from [[Calder]].}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">5</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|A [[Champion]] does not fail, even one in disgrace.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c7">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|A [[Champion]] can be unnerved by a gaze like solid blue-white eyes.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c16">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Champion]] might be able to keep men off [[Calder]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c16" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|A true [[Champion]] of the [[Champion’s Guild]] is more than just a [[Soulbound]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c17">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Champions]] can meditate to hone their skills.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c20">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">4</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Calder Marten]] has a [[Champion]] on his crew.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c4">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Alchemists]] claim their solutions can make one like a [[Champion]] but unbound by rules.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c8">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Champions]] possess physical enhancements that are [[Guild]] secrets.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c11">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|A former [[Champion]] is on [[Calder Marten]]'s ship.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c17">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|A [[Champion]] is a member of the [[Guild]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c12">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Champions]] can be hired to attack people.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c16">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Calder]] and [[Petal]] planned to bribe their way underneath the [[arena]] with the [[Champion]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c19">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Of Kings and Killers ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|A Champion is a specialized individual who may serve as a mercenary for hire. Known by the name [[Twelve]], this warrior fights using a [[sword]] while wearing a blindfold. These combatants possess augmentations that grant them resistance to most forms of poison, though they must meet specific requirements concerning their training and the nature of their [[Soulbound]]. While [[Calder]] possesses a Champion, the entity remains distinct from him, and samples of [[Champions]] are currently available.}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">8</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|A [[Champion]] can be a mercenary for hire.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c6">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[Champion]] is blindfolded and uses a [[sword]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c7">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[Champion]]'s name is [[Twelve]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c7" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Champion augmentation]] provides resistance to most poisons.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c14">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Calder]] has a [[Champion]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c16">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Champion]] samples are available.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c17">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Champions]] have requirements regarding training and the nature of their [[Soulbound]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c19">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|A [[Champion]] is different from [[Calder]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c24">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 24</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Of Killers and Kings ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|A Champion is a powerful combatant capable of tearing through walls and is often heavily armed. During a recent fight, one such individual was present as a combatant, appearing at the end of a row of boxes while wearing a blindfold and the [[Golden Crown of the Champions]]. This Champion exhibited physical signs of tension, such as sweating slightly, and possessed a power comparable to a bonfire just out of arm's reach. Because the [[Intent]] held by these individuals is preserved more effectively when donated voluntarily rather than taken involuntarily, they remain formidable figures of interest to others like [[Meia]], who dreams of rivaling them.}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">7</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Champions]] possess [[Intent]] that is preserved better when donated voluntarily than when taken from corpses or involuntarily.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c4">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|A [[Champion]] stood at the end of the row of boxes wearing a blindfold and the [[Golden Crown of the Champions]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c6">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Champion]] is present and began to sweat slightly.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c6" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Champion]] is a combatant who was present at the fight.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c8">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|A [[Champion]] is a powerful individual, often heavily armed, capable of tearing through walls.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c16">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The powers of the two [[Champions]] are like two bonfires just out of arm's reach.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c16" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Meia]] dreams of rivaling a [[Champion]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c22">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 22</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|“Light and life. He’s got a Champion onboard?”<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c4" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|“You will be like a Champion, but unbound by their rules!”<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c8" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Of Sea and Shadow]]
[[Category:Of Dawn and Darkness]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire concepts]]
[[Category:Titles]]
